cards.title: Cardiovascular System
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Heart anatomy: 4 chambers, valves (tricuspid, pulmonary, mitral, aortic)
  • Cardiac cycle: Systole (0.3s) + Diastole (0.5s) = 0.8s
  • Blood pressure regulation: Baroreceptors, RAAS, ANP
  • Coronary arteries: LAD, LCX, RCA territories

cards.title: Respiratory System
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Lung volumes: TV 500mL, IRV 3000mL, ERV 1000mL, RV 1200mL
  • Surfactant: Type II pneumocytes, lecithin:sphingomyelin ratio
  • V/Q ratio: Normal 0.8, V/Q mismatch in PE/pneumonia
  • Mechanics: Diaphragm (70%), intercostals (30%)

cards.title: Nervous System
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • CNS: Brain (1400g) + Spinal cord (45cm)
  • Neurotransmitters: ACh, dopamine, serotonin, GABA, glutamate
  • BBB: Tight junctions, astrocyte end-feet
  • Resting membrane potential: -70mV (Na+/K+ ATPase)

cards.title: Musculoskeletal System
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Muscle types: Skeletal (voluntary), cardiac, smooth (involuntary)
  • Sliding filament theory: Actin + myosin, ATP dependent
  • Bone remodeling: Osteoblasts (formation), osteoclasts (resorption)
  • Joint types: Fibrous, cartilaginous, synovial

cards.title: GI & Hepatic Anatomy
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • GI layers: Mucosa, submucosa, muscularis, serosa
  • Liver: Dual blood supply (portal 75%, hepatic artery 25%)
  • Enterohepatic circulation: Bile acids recycled 6–10×/day
  • Pancreas: Exocrine (enzymes) + endocrine (islets of Langerhans)

cards.title: Endocrine System
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Hypothalamus-pituitary axis: Tropic hormones, feedback loops
  • Insulin: Anabolic, glucose uptake (GLUT4), fat storage
  • Thyroid hormone: T4 (inactive) → T3 (active, via deiodinase)
  • Adrenal: Cortex (steroids: cortisol, aldosterone, DHEA), Medulla (catecholamines)

cards.title: Renal System
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Nephron: Glomerulus, PCT, loop of Henle, DCT, collecting duct
  • GFR: 125 mL/min, filtration fraction 20%
  • RAAS: Renin → Angiotensin I → ACE → Ang II → aldosterone
  • ADH (vasopressin): Aquaporin insertion in collecting duct

cards.title: Reproductive System
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Female: HPO axis, ovarian cycle (follicular + luteal)
  • Male: Spermatogenesis (74 days), testosterone from Leydig cells
  • Placenta: Hormone production (hCG, progesterone, oestrogen)
  • Fetal circulation: Ductus arteriosus, foramen ovale, ductus venosus

cards.title: Immune & Lymphatic System
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Primary lymphoid: Bone marrow (B cells), thymus (T cells)
  • Secondary lymphoid: Lymph nodes, spleen, MALT
  • Immunoglobulins: IgA (mucosal), IgG (most abundant), IgE (allergy), IgM (first response)
  • Complement system: Classical, lectin, alternative pathways

cards.title: Blood & Haematology
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • RBC lifespan: 120 days; degraded in spleen
  • Haemostasis: Primary (platelet plug) + Secondary (coagulation cascade)
  • Blood groups: ABO (H antigen), Rh system
  • Clotting factors: Extrinsic (VII), Intrinsic (VIII, IX, XI, XII), Common (X, V, II, I)
